blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: She's been out there the whole practice.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I was focused. Unlike some people last week.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Not on the route you weren't.

He looked at her again. She was writing something, looking up at the field every few seconds like she was noting something. She had a thermos and a beanie on and she looked like she'd chosen this spot specifically.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Like an actual notebook. Not a phone. A notebook.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: In the bleachers. On a Saturday. Watching practice.
Jonathan was still looking. Not obviously — just the way he got when something registered.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You gonna say something to her?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You're doing the thing you told me not to do.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I'm not doing anything. Run the next route.
